name: LIG Assets, Inc.
summary: LIG Assets, Inc. focuses on residential and commercial real estate business in the state of Texas. The company purchases commercial and residential real estate properties for resale and rental. It also invests, acquires, finances, and manages commercial properties, such as hotels, apartments, condos, retail, and office buildings; and offers loans for single family homes. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Carthage, Tennessee.
